title: Saxe.
content:
The mind that's sad it doth relax
            The humor of the witty Saxe,
            He puts us in a cheerful mood,
            Mirthful as our own Tom Hood.
meaning:
This evocative piece by James McIntyre, titled "Saxe.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
